properties.remark: REPORT OF FLOODING IN STREETS. ONE AND A HALF FEET OF WATER COVERING ALAMO STREET AND TEXAS HIGHWAY 16 STALLING SOME VEHICLES. THE ARROYO AT TEXAS HIGHWAY 16 AND CARLA STREET WAS OVERFLOWING WITH ABOUT ONE AND A HALF FEET OF WATER.
PENDLETON PARK IN HARLINEGN IS UNDER WATER. ONE LANE OF NORTH HARLINGEN LOOP 499 IS FLOODED.
HIGHWAY 107 AND 495 CLOSED DUE TO WATER OVER THE ROAD. 1 TO 2 FEET COVERING STREETS THROUGH DOWNTOWN MISSION.
NEAR INTERSECTION OF GLASSCOCK AND FM495.
ON NORTH BRIAD ROAD NORTH OF FM495.
WOMAN ON HIGHLAND PARK AVENUE REPORTING FLOOD WATERS UP TO THE ENTRANCE OF GARAGE. THE WATER HAS NOT YET ENTERED HOUSE.
FLOODING BETWEEN 23RD AND WARE ROAD ON FRONTAGE ROAD OF HWY 83 WESTBOUND. WATER UP TO WINDSHIELDS OF CARS.
